terms.definition: A scikit-learn object that chains named preprocessing transformers and a final estimator, fitting each step sequentially on training data and applying the same order at predict time.
A scikit-learn meta-transformer that applies different transformer pipelines to specified column subsets and concatenates the results.
The training-phase method where transformers learn parameters (medians, categories, means) and the final estimator learns model weights from training rows only.
Applies learned preprocessing to new data without refitting parameters—used for feature matrices or intermediate pipeline steps.
A scikit-learn wrapper that applies an arbitrary callable (often pandas cleaning) inside a Pipeline with optional fit-time validation.
Correcting schema and value-level issues—duplicates, wrong dtypes, stray whitespace, sentinel codes—so downstream transformers receive consistent inputs.
The ordered sequence of cleaning and transformation steps applied before model training and inference, usually encapsulated in sklearn Pipeline or workflow tooling.
